reviews.review_description:
Very great game in coop. Having fun with 2 other friends since it's a coop game that's quicker than demeo. Lots of upgrades and good choice of characters to play as. Little bit of strategy involved as you gear up your characters but becomes pretty easy after you get the top gear. Wish there was higher difficulty or ability to make your own maps.

There seems to be a bug in the mission don't fear the reaper where the non-host player can't move in round 3 or 4. Pretty annoying but hopefully will get fixed.

Unique and interesting presentation (bar room, game table). Unintuitive UI. I haven't invested enough time to tell if the gameplay/strategy is fun, but I think you probably need to invest at least 30 minutes to get a good feel of the game. For a similar scifi turn-based strategy game, I recommend Augmented Empire more.

This game is best played with a friend or two. Haven't played much but I did a few missions and got some new weapons and gear. Looking forward to jumping back in. My only wish is to be able to attempt corner shots and cover shots.

Really enjoy this game.
Great idea, having it in a bar area… with consoles for missions, upgrade, skill tree, load outs, info… even has its own bar to buy drinks, change music and a mini arcade game to play.

The game is very nice, clear and nice gfx… can zoom and rotate area, even move field of play up and down to get right into the action.

Sounds are very nice too, speech suitable too for each character.

There’s is lots of skills to unlock, various weapons and characters too… each able to be upgraded.

Reminds me of the Xcom and Laser Squad games.

Characters have different strength and weaknesses.

I’m a fan of TBS…. And this is one I will keep going back to.

Thanks

Mark from Facebook page “Meta Quest Promotions, giveaways and referrals) feel free to join

reviews.review_title: Would be awesome with multiplayer battle
reviews.review_description: Lovely graphics table top strategy shooting game. It also has a mini flat screen TV game you can play while inside the game. Very thoughtful and beautiful music in the background. The movement mechanics is very seamless. This game would really shine if there was multiplayer and you can play tactically against another person using different strategies like Demeo battles. Also adding more mini flat games to the TV would be awesome. Overall excellent game experience. Thank you Tin Man Games.
I really like this game. It’s easier to play an is better than demeo. They really need to add coop to this game. The way it is now their are no games to play online only single player.
Turn base fighting.  Had fun with IT.
Will this game get german UI update in the future?

developer_response.body: We are looking to add localisation in a future update!

reviews.review_description: Loving it but an issue is that it feels like the player can make themselves far too strong and unlock things very fast, its nice but i dont feel the game will last long sadly

Only 2 days I played it! Single player is completed on the max level everything.
Maybe I will try multiplayer.
Please prepare next levels, thanks.
The grind is far too easy n there are many ways to cheese the game in order to make yourself overpowered within the first 30 mins.

Kind of boring and with its poor release a few people play online. The gameplay is perfectly fine and I don’t have any real complaints there. But the voice lines from the characters are so obnoxious that I just can’t do it. This is just like when I got medal of honor For the quest. The gameplay was fine, but the characters were so annoying I couldn’t go on.. in particular the heavy class that quotes Internet and gamer tropes in more annoying D Va from overwatch voice

This is a fun game, but I bought it for the multiplayer. Which does not work. When I try to host a table, I just get stuck in that hideous loading screen. I can move around like my character is physically in the bar, But again all I see is that terrible loading screen. Time for a refund.

developer_response.body: We've now pushed out a build that fixes the multiplayer issue!

reviews.review_title: not recommended: becomes to fast boring
reviews.review_description: could be interesting if there would be more tactic in this game. it's also not even close to demeo. there is  no depth in this game. mechanics are quite simple. the tech tree is ok but you can unlock literally everything playing the first level on the easiest mode but add some debuffs, which will multiply the reward to ridiculous x51 times. It's maybe a bug, but if not then it's too easy and boring.

I like the game.
It's a great cyberpunk setting.
It is lighter and not as tactical as Demeo. 
However, I'm still in the first levels.

Subtitles for everything said would be nice. The game is not completely subtitled. 

The sound from the DJs fits, but always comes from one corner. More stereo sound would be nice. There should be more virtual speakers in the bar.

i don´t find multiplayer users - maybe there are only a hand full?

Wishes for the future:
*Mixed reality
*Various bars
*Subtitles in various languages
*Quest 3 better graphics optimization

Otherwise, thank you for the great game!
